description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that logs into the GitLab Container Registry before each job, uses the docker:stable image with a docker:dind service, and defines two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage add a build job that runs only on the master branch, executes docker build -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest" . then docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest". In the deploy stage add a deploy job that runs manually, executes docker run --rm -v $(pwd)/docker-compose.yml:/stack.yml -e NAME=portfolio registry.gitlab.com/jebster/devops/deploy:1.1. Both jobs share the same before_script for docker login.
